name: Chinese-Style Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic.
2. Use one of the following soup mixes: Onion, Onion-Mushroom, Beefy-Mushroom, or Beefy-Onion.
3. For best flavor, use Imported Soy Sauce; domestic can be used but will not taste as good.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F.
5. In a large saucepan, melt butter and cook the garlic with the soup mix over medium heat until the garlic is golden.
6. Stir in tomato puree, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, and chili sauce. Bring to a boil, then simmer, stirring occasionally for 15 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, arrange the spareribs meaty side up on an aluminum foil-lined baking pan or broiler rack.
8. Bake the spareribs for 20 minutes.
9. Brush the spareribs generously with the sauce, then continue baking, meaty side up, brushing occasionally with remaining sauce for another 50 minutes, or until the spareribs are done.
10. Makes about 12 appetizer servings or 7 main dish servings.
